news.title: ABD'de 9 yıldır devam eden Halkbank davası düştü
news.summary: Halkbank, ABD'de 2019 yılından beri devam eden davanın 17 Haziran'da New York'ta görülen duruşmada düşürüldüğünü açıkladı.

news.title: Türkiye katılma hakkı kazandığı 1950 Dünya Kupası'nda neden yoktu?
news.summary: Türkiye, 1950 Dünya Kupası'na katılma hakkını sahada kazanmasına rağmen, savaş sonrası dönemin ekonomik ve psikolojik koşulları nedeniyle turnuvaya gitmemişti.

news.title: "Tetikçi temin etme ve suç örgütlerini övücü" paylaşımlar yapanlara operasyon. 258 gözaltı
news.summary: İçişleri Bakanlığı, 54 ilde sosyal medya platformları üzerinden "tetikçi temin etme ve suç örgütlerini övücü" paylaşım yapanlara yönelik düzenlenen operasyonlarda 258 şüphelinin gözaltına alındığını duyurdu.

news.title: Bakan Çiftçi: Sahipsiz sokak hayvanlarının yüzde 83'ü toplandı

news.title: Israel launches fresh strikes on Lebanon despite Trump criticism
news.summary: Speaking on Tuesday, Trump said Israel's PM Benjamin Netanyahu needed "to be more responsible with respect to Lebanon".

news.title: Status quo at Jerusalem's holiest site under threat as Israeli nationalists flout rules
news.summary: Israeli nationalists are increasingly flouting a convention on how faiths share the al-Aqsa mosque compound.

news.title: 'They came with machetes' - deadline looms for migrants to leave South Africa
news.summary: Protesters have set 30 June as the date for all undocumented migrants to leave the country.

news.title: Group planned to attack White House UFC event using snipers and drones, FBI says

news.title: Norway's crown princess undergoes successful lung transplant, palace says
news.summary: Crown Princess Mette-Marit, who suffered from pulmonary fibrosis, will now spend several weeks recovering in hospital.

news.title: Russian artist and outspoken Putin critic shot dead days after protest
news.summary: Russian artist was shot dead in Poland just three days after a performance protest in Berlin near the Russian embassy.

news.title: Strait of Hormuz reopens: But can ships’ safety be assured?
news.summary: Shipping operators and insurers prefer to wait and watch from a distance for now.

news.title: Pakistan ends 'luxury tax' on menstrual products, contraceptives. Will prices drop?
news.summary: In Pakistan, taxes on menstrual products can add up. Activists have long worked to change this. Now a new budget wipes out the 18% sales tax. But questions remain about the impact on prices.

news.title: Taiwan says Chinese pressure over the island is the "new normal"
news.summary: Taiwan's Foreign Ministry on Tuesday said the scholars' passports and mobile phones were confiscated, and they were detained in Mombasa for more than 20 hours before being allowed to leave the country.

news.title: Senate to proceed with intel chief confirmation hearing despite Trump's call to delay
news.summary: The Senate Intelligence Committee said it will move ahead with the confirmation process for Jay Clayton as Director of National Intelligence Today. But President Trump is calling for a delay.

facts.text: Honey never spoils — edible honey has been found in ancient tombs.
A day on Venus is longer than its year.
Bananas are berries; strawberries are not.
